items.label: Out Now
items.title: We, the Void
items.description: The latest single from I See Red's upcoming album, Red is Dead. A crushing blend of modern death metal aggression and atmospheric depth.

items.label: Wacken, Germany • July 2026
items.title: Live at Wacken Open Air Festival
items.description: Join I See Red for an exclusive show at Wacken Open Air Festival. Experience the raw power of our live performance and witness the debut of tracks from our upcoming album 'Red is Dead'.

items.label: Studio Report
items.title: Red is Dead - Album Update
items.description: We've officially wrapped recording for our debut album 'Red is Dead'! Mixing is underway with legendary producer Fotis Benardo. Expect crushing riffs, haunting melodies, and our most ambitious work yet. Pre-orders coming soon.
